ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine sample */,
  "wine_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine */,
  "vintage" INTEGER /* Year the wine was produced */,
  "grape_variety" INTEGER /* Variety of grape used */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the wine was produced */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the producer of the wine */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the batch of production */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the wine was produced */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions in which the wine is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_grape_variety FOREIGN KEY ("grape_variety") REFERENCES grape_varieties ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity level */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity level */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid level */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar level */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chlorides level */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide level */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide level */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphates level */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol percentage */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality metrics were recorded */,
  "taster_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the taster about the wine's taste and aroma */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the machine used to measure the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine-producing region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate in the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grape_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grape variety characteristics */,
  "ripening_time" TEXT /* Time of year when the grapes typically ripen */,
  "sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity to diseases and pests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "predicted_quality" REAL /* Predicted quality score */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "assessor_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessor conducting the evaluation */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score assigned to the wine quality */,
  "taste_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the taste of the wine */,
  "aroma_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the aroma of the wine */,
  "visual_appearance" TEXT /* Notes on the visual appearance of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the wine sample */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "market_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of market trends and consumer preferences */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the wine */,
  "sales_forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted sales based on market analysis */,
  "promotion_strategies" TEXT /* Strategies for promoting the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_reports_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's functionality */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
